English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York Grape Country Cooperative records
New York Grape Country Cooperative
6709
2.5 cubic feet. 2.5 cubic feet.
1985-1988. Correspondence, Financial Records, Legal Documents, Printed Materials, Publications Ephemera, correspondence, and financial records and industry related material. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 843 ======= 843 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5817424
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Evan Fay Earle
Date completed:
June 2007
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle June 2007
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
New York Grape Country Co-Op was incorporated into produce and market vinefresh, the pink grape juice made from wine grapes grown in New York State, primarily in the Finger Lakes region.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records document the production, marketing, and sale of Vinefresh, the pink grape juice, through board records, reports, correspondence, production and sales ledgers and promotional materials.
Cite As:
New York Grape Country Cooperative, #6709. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 3 (grower information) restricted until 2025, 2026, 2035, and 2055 as marked or by permission of the curator.
Viticulturists. Grapes. Grape juice -- United States. Grape juice industry -- New York (State) Grape industry -- New York (State).
